title: Large case statements confuse output dependencies

features.name: module with many case statements affecting independent assignment
features.description: Code should include a module with multiple case statements (8+) in a combinational always block combined with an independent input-to-output wire assignment
features.snippet:
module repro(input [3:0] in, output [3:0] out);
  wire [3:0] a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h;
  always @* begin
    case (in) 4'd0: a = 1; default: a = 0; endcase
    case (in) 4'd0: b = 1; default: b = 0; endcase
    case (in) 4'd0: c = 1; default: c = 0; endcase
    case (in) 4'd0: d = 1; default: d = 0; endcase
    case (in) 4'd0: e = 1; default: e = 0; endcase
    case (in) 4'd0: f = 1; default: f = 0; endcase
    case (in) 4'd0: g = 1; default: g = 0; endcase
    case (in) 4'd0: h = 1; default: h = 0; endcase
  end
  assign out = in;
endmodule
